en.title: ChatGPT prompt generator
en.prompt: I want you to act as a ChatGPT prompt generator, I will send a topic, you have to generate a ChatGPT prompt based on the content of the topic, the prompt should start with 'I want you to act as ', and guess what I might do, and expand the prompt accordingly Describe the content to make it useful.
en.remark: Generate prompts for ChatGPT based on the topic.

metaTitle: ChatGPT Prompt Generator: Optimize AI Interactions
metaDescription: Want better AI answers? This generator creates detailed, persona-based prompts from simple topics. Maximize ChatGPT's potential with precise instructions now!

faq.q: Is one topic word enough, or should I write more context?
faq.a: A single word usually gets you a generic prompt. Add the use case, target audience, and output format, for example: "topic: interview coaching, user is a new graduate, expected output is a mock interview dialogue." That gives you a prompt with a structure you can actually use directly.

faq.q: The generated prompt did not follow the "act as" role pattern?
faq.a: Ask it to redo and stress "must start with 'I want you to act as' and include a concrete role name." The AI sometimes skips the template and writes task instructions directly, so pinning the opening format forces it into the role-based pattern.
